# Contributing Guidelines

Contributions to this package are most welcome!

The solution includes three test sites — `…TestSite.v13`, `.v17` and `.v18` — one per
supported Umbraco major, to make working with this repository easier. Each is configured
to do an unattended install; the login details are in its `appsettings.json`
(`Administrator` / `admin@example.com` / `1234567890`).

See [docs/LOCAL-TESTING.md](../docs/LOCAL-TESTING.md) for the step-by-step guide to
testing the trimmer against a running site (local disk cache or Azurite).
